competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Recent Updates (June 2026): Enterprise customers can now manage multiple Cursor teams from one place, with different security, governance, budget, and feature controls for each. These capabilities are now generally available to all Enterprise customers. Cursor is now available in Jira. Users can assign work items to Cursor, or mention @Cursor in a comment to kick off a cloud agent. May 2026 Updates: Cursor Automations are now available in the Agents Window, and agents can attach multiple repos to an automation so they reason across all required context and work across repos to deliver, test, and verify tasks. Users can use the /loop skill for local long-running agents. For example, to check deploy status every 5 minutes or work on this feature until tests pass. April 2026 Updates: Cursor can now respond by creating interactive canvases with visualizations including dashboards and custom interfaces built using components like tables, boxes, diagrams, and charts. In the Agents Window, canvases are durable artifacts that live in the side panel alongside the terminal, browser, and source control. Teams Pricing: Cursor increases Teams usage limits, adds new Premium seat for heavy agent users. Composer 2.5 introduced as substantial improvement on long-horizon agentic tasks.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Recent Updates (June 2026): Enterprise customers can now manage multiple Cursor teams from one place, with different security, governance, b

changes.description: Cursor Automations：agent 可跨多个 repo 附加上下文，自动完成跨 repo 的 deliver/test/verify 全流程（May 2026）
changes.evidence: 「agents can attach multiple repos to an automation so they reason across all required context and work across repos to deliver, test, and verify tasks」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4（跨 session / 跨工具 / 跨 owner artifact pull）：跨 repo 的 agent 自动化推理链

key_findings: Cursor canvas 成为 Agents Window 中的持久化 artifact，与终端/浏览器/源代码控制并列 —— 直接逼近 meee2 的 descriptive canvas + live link 概念，为本周期最高优先级观察信号
Cursor Automations 支持跨多 repo 推理，/loop skill 支持 agent 持续运行直到条件满足
进入 Jira + 企业多团队治理 GA，Cursor 的 orchestration 层覆盖范围快速扩张

competitors.name: Claude.ai
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Artifacts (April 2026, all paid plans + inside Projects): Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly, meaning you can build intelligent micro-applications where AI runs inside the artifact itself. Artifacts now support persistent storage across sessions — an artifact can save and retrieve data between visits. Artifacts now support MCP servers, enabling direct connections to external services like Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and more. Live Artifacts (April 2026): dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. Projects: persistent workspaces with 200K context window, uploaded files and custom instructions. MCP: over 200 official and community MCP servers as of May 2026. MCP transforms Claude from a chat interface into a connected workflow tool that can read documents, query databases, and take actions in external services. Claude Code: Opus 4.8 with high-effort defaults, dynamic workflows, faster Fast mode. Dynamic workflows: ask Claude to create a workflow and it orchestrates work across tens to hundreds of agents in the background, so you can take on larger, more complex tasks.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Artifacts (April 2026, all paid plans + inside Projects): Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly, meaning you can build intelligent mic

changes.description: Live Artifacts（April 2026）：每次打开时自动刷新当前数据的仪表盘和追踪器
changes.evidence: 「Live Artifacts...are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2（跨工具 artifact live link，不是 snapshot）：Anthropic 直接实现 live artifact 概念，与 meee2 core differentiator 高度重合，为本周期最高威胁信号

changes.description: Artifacts 跨 session 持久化存储 + 内置 MCP server 接入（Google Calendar、Gmail、Slack 等）
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts now support persistent storage across sessions...Artifacts now support Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, enabling direct connections to external services like Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4（跨 session / 跨工具 / 跨 owner artifact pull）：artifact 既能跨 session 持久化，又能跨工具 pull 实时数据

changes.description: Dynamic workflows：Claude 在后台编排数十至数百个 agent 并发执行大型复杂任务
changes.evidence: 「ask Claude to create a workflow and it orchestrates work across tens to hundreds of agents in the background, so you can take on larger, more complex tasks」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（AI=快 session，同一协议下大规模并发）：multi-agent 动态编排层直接触碰 session 协议差异化

changes.description: Artifacts 可直接调用 Claude API，支持在 artifact 内运行 AI 逻辑，构建 micro-application
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly, which means you can build intelligent micro-applications where the AI runs inside the artifact itself」

key_findings: Live Artifacts 直接实现「刷新数据的 live dashboard」—— 与 meee2 差异化锚点 #2（live link 而非 snapshot）高度重合，需立即重点关注
Artifacts 获得跨 session 持久化 + MCP 跨工具接入能力，同时覆盖锚点 #2 和 #4
Dynamic workflows 在后台编排数十至数百 agent，Claude 正在构建类似 meee2 session 协议的多 agent 治理层

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebFetch，github.com/features/copilot。Agent & Autonomous Features: Cloud Agents: Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously. Third-party agent support including Claude Code and Codex. Enterprise agent management with detailed audit logs and governance controls. Workspace & Knowledge Features: Copilot Spaces: Creates shared knowledge repositories using docs and codebase context to maintain team consistency. Codebase indexing for deeper organizational understanding. Custom fine-tuned private models available for enterprise customers. Multi-File & Context Capabilities: Examines multiple open editor files and repository URLs to identify relevant context. Supports agent mode with file validation and edit proposals. Works across GitHub, IDEs, CLI, and project tools. Background & Session Features: Agents work in the background handling autonomous workflows. Thread history retention for chat features to improve response accuracy. Cloud agent assignment directly from GitHub issues. New Positioning: Marketed as Your AI accelerator for every workflow supporting multiple LLMs optimized for speed, accuracy, or cost.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebFetch，github.com/features/copilot。Agent & Autonomous Features: Cloud Agents: Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let t
competitors.no_change_reason: 页面内容与上次抓取（2026-05-24）基本一致：agent 任务分配、企业管控层、Copilot Spaces 等核心功能点和定位均无实质新增

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Linear Agent (March 2026, public beta, all teams): Agent and Skills included on all Linear plans. Automations and Code Intelligence available on Business and Enterprise. Skills: when a conversation gets you to a good result, you can ask Linear to save it as a reusable skill, especially useful for recurring workflows like catching up on projects or drafting issues from meeting notes. Automations: trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage, Linear can intelligently help you refine, synthesize, or act on it. Code Intelligence (May 14 2026): extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase, supports code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications. Linear Releases (April 2026): Generate release notes with Linear Agent based on included issues. Linear Diffs (May 27 2026): just released. Deeplink to AI coding tools (Feb 2026): launch preferred coding tool directly from a Linear issue with prefilled prompt including issue ID and all relevant context. UI refresh (March 2026). CEO declares issue tracking dead - Linear adopts agentic AI (The Register, March 26 2026).
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Linear Agent (March 2026, public beta, all teams): Agent and Skills included on all Linear plans. Automations and Code Intelligence available

changes.description: Linear Agent 全面公测（March 2026）：Automations 在 issue 进入 triage 时自动触发 agent 工作流
changes.evidence: 「You can also trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage, and Linear can intelligently help you refine, synthesize, or act on it」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（AI=快 session，嵌入工作流，ambient 触发）：Linear Agent 作为 ambient 团队成员在状态变化时自动触发，向「AI=快 session，嵌入工作流」方向演化

changes.description: Code Intelligence（May 2026）：Linear Agent 获得代码库感知，可诊断 app 功能、设计技术规格
changes.evidence: 「Code Intelligence extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase and supports code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4 方向：跨工具（project management + codebase）上下文拉取，agent 可感知代码库状态

changes.description: CEO 宣布「issue tracking is dead」，Linear 向 AI-first 工作协调平台转型
changes.evidence: 「Linear adopts agentic AI as CEO declares issue tracking dead」（来源：The Register, 2026-03-26，推断：非官方，标题可能经过媒体演绎）
changes.meee2_relevance: hi 威胁级别信号：产品定位主动向 AI 工作协调转型，路径可能逐步接近 meee2 的 workspace 层

changes.description: Skills：将成功对话保存为可复用技能，支持周期性工作流（如会议纪要 → 自动生成 issue）
changes.evidence: 「When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can ask Linear to save it as a reusable skill, which is especially useful for recurring workflows」

key_findings: Linear Agent 全面公测，ambient 自动触发工作流 —— AI 作为团队成员嵌入 issue 流转，接近 meee2 锚点 #1
Code Intelligence 让 Linear Agent 具备代码库感知，跨越 project management 与 codebase 的边界
CEO 宣布 issue tracking 已死，Linear 正在向 AI-first 工作协调平台主动转型

competitors.name: Notion AI
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Custom Agents (Feb 2026): AI teammates handling repetitive tasks like answering FAQs, compiling status updates, automating workflows. Over 1 million Custom Agents created since launch. Developer Platform (May 13 2026): Notion Workers - hosted runtime for custom code, coding agent writes the code, deploys through CLI, runs in secure sandbox; CLI (command-line interface) for developers and coding agents to sign in, read/action in Notion, build/deploy Workers; External Agents API - bring external agents into Notion, partnered with Claude, Codex, Decagon. Notion MCP: connect to external apps via MCP including Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub, Intercom, Amplitude, Attio, Sentry. Custom Agents can now read and reply in private Slack channels. Agent Management Controls: control who creates agents and spending limits. Notion positioned as 'a hub where people and agents can collaborate across tools and databases'.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Custom Agents (Feb 2026): AI teammates handling repetitive tasks like answering FAQs, compiling status updates, automating workflows. Over 1

changes.description: Developer Platform（May 2026）：Workers 提供代码执行沙箱，External Agents API 引入 Claude/Codex 等外部 agent
changes.evidence: 「Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents」「hub where people and agents can collaborate across tools and databases」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（人和 AI 在同一协议下协作）+ 锚点 #4（跨工具 artifact pull）：Notion 明确以「人+agent 协同枢纽」定位，与 meee2 差异化锚点结构重叠增加

changes.description: Notion MCP：通过 MCP 接入 Linear、Figma、HubSpot、GitHub 等 10+ 外部工具
changes.evidence: 「Notion MCP: Connect to external apps via the Model Context Protocol. Use pre-configured partner integrations, including Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4（跨工具 artifact pull）：Notion 正在构建 cross-tool context 枢纽

key_findings: Notion 明确定位为「人+agent 协同枢纽」，Developer Platform 赋予 agent 代码执行 + 外部工具读写能力
MCP 接入 10+ 工具 + External Agents API（Claude、Codex），Notion 正在构建跨工具 agent 协调层
Custom Agents 超过 100 万个，规模化验证了 agent-in-workspace 产品方向的市场需求

competitors.name: Slack
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Developer platform: single slack create agent command, bring-your-own-LLM flexibility, Claude SDK and OpenAI SDK and Pydantic AI support, open source sample apps (Starter Agent, Support Agent). AI Generate step in Workflow Builder: write a prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), LLM generates response as workflow step; supports summarizing messages, translating text, drafting responses. Rebuilt Slackbot as fully powered AI agent: searches enterprise data, drafts documents, takes action on behalf of employees, GA for Business+ and Enterprise+. Block Kit new components: cards, alerts, carousel, code/data tables for building high-density interactive agent UIs. Canvas AI assistance coming soon: AI can summarize key points, extract action items, generate first draft from Slack conversation.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Developer platform: single slack create agent command, bring-your-own-LLM flexibility, Claude SDK and OpenAI SDK and Pydantic AI support, op

changes.description: Slackbot 重构为企业级全功能 AI agent（GA）：搜索企业数据、起草文件、代替用户执行操作
changes.evidence: 「transforming it from a simple notification tool into...a fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data, drafting documents, and taking action on behalf of employees」

changes.description: AI Generate 步骤内嵌 Workflow Builder：可选 channels/canvases/lists 作为知识源，LLM 在工作流中生成响应
changes.evidence: 「The step allows users to write a prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), and have an LLM generate a response as part of a workflow」

key_findings: Slackbot 升级为全功能 AI agent（GA），Workflow Builder 获得原生 AI 生成步骤
变化主要在 comms 层和工作流自动化层，与 meee2 session 协议/live link 等核心差异化无实质结构重叠

competitors.name: Reflect
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。AI model options: GPT-4o or Claude 3.5 Sonnet available for AI tools, voice transcriber, AI assistant, chat with notes. Mobile AI palette editor available on iPhone app (same as desktop/browser). Link auto-summarization: when user saves a link, Reflect generates AI summary; gives semantic search engine more context. iCal integration: add events from iCal via iCloud connection. SQLite rewrite brought to iPad app for performance increase. Images available offline and sync when back online. No new agent, session, ambient, or menu bar features detected.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。AI model options: GPT-4o or Claude 3.5 Sonnet available for AI tools, voice transcriber, AI assistant, chat with notes. Mobile AI palette

changes.description: AI 模型升级至 GPT-4o 和 Claude 3.5 Sonnet，语音转录和 AI 助手提速；移动端 AI 功能与桌面对齐
changes.evidence: 「Reflect's AI tools now offer the option to use either GPT-4o...or Claude 3.5 Sonnet」

key_findings: 仅模型升级和 UX 优化，无 agent、session、live link 或 peripheral 等方向的实质性新功能，与 meee2 结构重叠无变化

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Presets renamed to Agents, reused across chats — update agent configuration once and change applies to every chat that uses it. Memory added: chats remember context about you and feel more personal. Skills added: give Raycast AI custom instructions and knowledge for tasks you do often. Skills and AI Extensions loaded into chat dynamically when relevant, no need to mention manually. System-wide AI dictation similar to other AI dictation apps. Quick Fix command: selects text, fixes spelling/grammar, pastes back corrected text. Experimental: MCP HTTP Servers support for HTTP MCP servers using SSE and Streamable protocols. AI Extensions for Ollama models for tool calling with local models. Chats can be auto-archived after set period. Raycast 2.0 public beta: Windows support, new UI, faster search, AI dictation.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Presets renamed to Agents, reused across chats — update agent configuration once and change applies to every chat that uses it. Memory adde

changes.description: Memory 系统 + 持久化 Agents：跨对话记住用户上下文，Agent 配置跨 chat 复用
changes.evidence: 「Memory was added so chats remember context about you and feel more personal...Presets are now called Agents, and they're reused across chats. Update an agent's configuration once and the change applies to every chat that uses it」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4（跨 session artifact pull）+ 锚点 #5（Peripheral 层）：Raycast 在 peripheral/menu-bar 层构建跨 session 记忆，与 meee2 的 peripheral 战略方向直接重叠

changes.description: Skills 动态自动加载：根据上下文相关性自动调入，无需用户手动召唤
changes.evidence: 「Skills and AI Extensions are now loaded into the chat dynamically when they're relevant, so you don't need to mention them manually」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5（Peripheral 层：不切焦点，自动感知上下文）

changes.description: MCP HTTP Servers 支持（实验性），Raycast 成为 peripheral 层的 MCP 跨工具枢纽
changes.evidence: 「Available experimental features include MCP HTTP Servers support for HTTP MCP servers using SSE and Streamable protocols」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4（跨工具 artifact pull）通过 peripheral 层实现

changes.description: Raycast 2.0 公测：支持 Windows，扩大 peripheral AI launcher 平台覆盖范围
changes.evidence: 「Raycast 2.0 Is Now in Public Beta: Windows Support, Faster Search」

key_findings: Raycast 在 peripheral 层增加跨 session Memory + 持久化 Agents，与 meee2 的 peripheral 策略方向直接重叠（同为 menu-bar/launcher 定位）
Skills 动态自动加载 + MCP 实验性支持，Raycast 正在构建感知上下文的 ambient peripheral 层
Raycast 2.0 拓展到 Windows，peripheral 覆盖范围扩大

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Replit Agent 4 (March 2026): built around four pillars: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster. Multi-agent parallel processing: multiple agents tackle different parts simultaneously (auth, database logic, backend, frontend design) with progress fully visible. Sub-agents: Agent 4 automatically breaks large tasks into smaller forks, runs concurrently using sub-agents, merges results, resolves conflicts with dedicated sub-agents. Collaborative workspace: multiple team members can submit requests simultaneously while agent intelligently sequences and executes in optimal order. Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent. Background task execution: every request broken into discrete tasks that run in background; team members track status, review results, approve changes before merging. Connectors and AI Integrations enabled by default for Teams and Enterprise, powering over 100k active repl connections (May 2026).
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Replit Agent 4 (March 2026): built around four pillars: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster. Multi-agent parallel pr

changes.description: Agent 4：多团队成员可与 agent 在共享 session 中协作，或各自独立线程并行提交任务
changes.evidence: 「Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议）：推断：Replit 的「shared session alongside agent」模型与 meee2 session 同构概念在结构上有接近，但聚焦 app 构建，范式差异仍较大

changes.description: 并行 sub-agent 架构：大任务自动拆分为并行 fork，由专用 sub-agent 合并结果和冲突
changes.evidence: 「Agent 4 automatically breaks them into smaller forks, runs them concurrently using sub-agents, and merges the results, resolving any conflicts with dedicated sub-agents」

key_findings: Replit Agent 4 引入「人+agent 共享 session」协作模式，并行 sub-agent 架构，但聚焦 app 构建，与 meee2 workspace 范式差异较大
100k+ active repl connections 验证多 agent 协作平台的规模化需求

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Claude Code and Open Code agent integration added in v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only). Codex hook support added May 2026. Amp integration. Official integrations: Claude Code, OpenCode, Amp, Codex. Remote cloud AI models: Gemini and Grok support added. Enhanced Gemini language support for multilingual transcription. Bulk vocabulary import via CSV. Redesigned UI: new history, full text search, segmented playback, fast load, multi-select delete, upgraded model library. New recording retention setting: auto-clean old recordings on configurable schedule. Per-mode autocapitalize toggle. Lower volume option (15% while recording).
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Claude Code and Open Code agent integration added in v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only). Codex hook support added May 2026. Amp integration.

changes.description: 接入 Claude Code、OpenCode、Amp、Codex，成为 AI coding agent 生态的语音输入层
changes.evidence: 「Superwhisper added Claude Code and Open Code agent integration in v2.13.0 (April 2026)...Codex hook support added in May 2026」

key_findings: Superwhisper 加强与 AI coding agent 的集成（Claude Code、Codex、Amp），巩固其语音输入层定位，无 session 协议或 workspace 相关扩张

alerts.headline: Cursor canvas 成为 Agents Window 中的持久化 artifact，与终端/浏览器/源代码控制并列——直接逼近 meee2 descriptive canvas + live link
alerts.evidence: 「In the Agents Window, canvases are durable artifacts that live in the side panel alongside the terminal, browser, and source control」
alerts.action_suggestion: 重点验证 Cursor canvas 是否支持跨 session 持久化和实时数据刷新。若 canvas 是静态 snapshot，meee2 的 live link 差异仍然成立；若 canvas 可 live refresh，需立即在 roadmap 中强化 descriptive-first 和 cross-tool live link 的差异叙事，以及「flow 从真实行为 emerge」这一 Cursor 尚未触及的核心抽象

alerts.headline: Live Artifacts 直接实现「刷新数据的 live dashboard」，跨 session 持久化 + MCP 跨工具接入——三项同时触碰 meee2 核心锚点 #2 和 #4
alerts.evidence: 「Live Artifacts...are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them」「Artifacts now support persistent storage across sessions...MCP servers, enabling direct connections to external services」
alerts.action_suggestion: Claude.ai Live Artifacts 是目前最直接触碰 meee2 锚点 #2 的竞品动作。建议团队调研 Live Artifacts 的实际刷新机制（push vs pull vs scheduled）并明确 meee2 live link 的技术差异（e.g. 双向 live link、任意 artifact 可 pull、非 Claude 专属、人在 agent 图内的 session 结构）

alerts.headline: Linear Agent 全面公测：ambient 自动触发工作流 + Code Intelligence 跨越 PM/codebase 边界，CEO 宣布 issue tracking 已死
alerts.evidence: 「trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage」「Code Intelligence extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase」
alerts.action_suggestion: 持续追踪 Linear Agent 的 Skills/Automations 是否向跨工具 session 管理演化。当前仍聚焦 project/issue tracking 状态机，但 CEO 定位转型 + Code Intelligence 跨边界能力是明确的 hi 级信号。meee2 可在「跨工具 session 而非跨 issue 状态机」的差异上建立清晰叙事
